summary: Tested WhatsApp CRM automation bot features. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). Bot correctly detects greetings, options 1-7, lead sources (Facebook/Instagram), and returns appropriate responses. Business hours logic working (currently 9:17 PM IST = outside hours). Follow-up scheduling is active with pending follow-ups.
critical_code_review_comments: Bot status API correctly returns business hours config (Mon-Sat 10AM-7PM IST)
Bot test API correctly detects greeting messages (hi, hello, namaste, etc.)
Bot test API correctly detects option numbers 1-7 and keyword variations
Bot test API correctly identifies Facebook/Instagram lead sources
Webhook endpoint accepts incoming message payloads and triggers automation
After-hours response logic working - is_business_hours=false at 9:17 PM IST
Quick reply responses working for option selections (e.g., option 3 returns subsidy info)
Follow-up scheduling active - 2 pending follow-ups, some cancelled when customer responded
Duplicate message prevention working - test phone doesn't get repeat welcome messages
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp automation bot fully tested. All core features working: greeting detection, option 1-7 detection, keyword matching, lead source identification, business hours logic, after-hours responses, quick replies, follow-up scheduling. WhatsApp Cloud API send is not mocked but decision logic is fully functional.

features_verified.Bot test API detects greeting messages: VERIFIED - hi, hello, namaste all detected as greetings

api_tests_passed: GET /api/whatsapp/automation/bot/status - Returns bot status with business hours
POST /api/whatsapp/automation/bot/test - Tests greeting detection (hi, hello, namaste)
POST /api/whatsapp/automation/bot/test - Tests keyword detection (home solar, subsidy, price, site visit)
GET /api/whatsapp/automation/bot/settings - Returns bot settings with business hours
notes: WhatsApp Cloud API send is not mocked but will fail without valid credentials. Testing focused on decision logic which is fully functional. Current time 9:17 PM IST is outside business hours (10AM-7PM), so after_hours responses are correctly triggered.
